1.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Classify the given text into one of these categories: abbreviation, description, entity, human, location, numeric. Answer with the category name only.'

    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

2.mb_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='You are acting as the primary question classifier in a real-time question answering system used by emergency response teams. Accurate classification of each incoming question is critical, as it determines which specialized subsystem processes the request. Given a question (for example, "Where is the nearest hospital?"), classify it into one of these mutually exclusive categories based on the expected answer type: abbreviation, description, entity, human, location, or numeric. Output only the category name. Do not provide explanations or additional information—your precision directly impacts the speed and safety of emergency operations.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))
